settings.text:
Got a question about your order, a jersey, or anything else? We're here to help. Fill in the form below and a real member of the INTLFans team will get back to you within 24 hours on business days.

Before reaching out, you may find your answer faster on our Track Your Order page if you're following up on a delivery. For sizing questions, check our Size Guide before placing your order.

settings.heading: Before You Go
settings.subtext: You might find what you're looking for right here.
settings.card1_text: Wondering when your jersey will arrive? Check our full shipping timeline to see exactly what happens from the moment you place your order to delivery at your door.
settings.card2_text: Not sure which size to order? Our size guide breaks down chest, waist and hip measurements so you can find the perfect fit before you buy.
settings.card3_text: From Argentina to Germany, we carry official replica jerseys for the world's greatest national teams. Find yours before the World Cup 2026.
